rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Known correct Claude Code facts (Plan mode = Shift+Tab cycle / /plan).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture correctly names plan mode as Shift+Tab toggle and a permission state; matches §6 and code.claude.com/docs/en/permission-modes.md.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify before assert.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: All platform claims (permission state, Shift+Tab, read-only behavior, descriptive plan-file naming) match shipped reality; maintainer-block has dated source URL with [practitioner direct] label.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sessions are the unit of work.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture uses 'session' correctly ('your own session right now'; 'Other sessions could be making progress elsewhere').

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source URL + type label mandatory; maintainer-block scope.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Source cited in maintainer-block 'Frameworks riffed on' with URL + [practitioner direct] label + verified-date stamp. No body-prose label leak.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Freshness 6 months.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Source verified 2026-04-22; current date 2026-05-15 — within 6-month window.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Zombie stat guard.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No statistics in lecture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Single fenced prompt contains plain text only.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Action lead-in (one sentence, command verb, <20 words).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lead-in present: 'Ask Claude to describe what changed in its behaviour when plan mode turned on.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape (lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt uses '**Prompt** *(Claude Code)*' label with fenced block; canonical shape.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Skills invoked by name, not path.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No skill references in lecture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No markdown shout inside fenced blocks.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Fenced prompt is plain text; no bold/italic shout.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No CWD restatement inside prompt body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt does not restate paths or working directory.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strong-bold prompt label is exactly **Prompt**.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Label is exactly '**Prompt**'; renderer match confirmed.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Prompts live in registry / inline blocks legal during migration.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Inline block passes through expander unchanged (short, lecture-scoped).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Artifact-realism check.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No skills, tools, or paths invoked that would need install.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body — technical angle.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Optional 30-second prompt is fenced (legal under rule 16 — fenced is always permitted, loose is the carve-out for optional moves).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Rule that does not force is worse than no rule.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture content, not a process rule.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Skeptical pushback = re-verify trigger.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture content, not orchestrator behavior.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification machinery needs smoke-test.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture, no verification machinery built.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture does not deal with context-loading mechanics.

platform_claims_checked.claim: Plan mode in Claude Code is a permission state, not a feature.
You press Shift+Tab until the status bar reads plan.
The agent is now read-only. It reads files, runs shell commands to explore, writes a plan file, but it can't edit or execute until you approve.
The plan file has a descriptive name now (migrate-auth-hash-calm-otter.md, not random words).

citations_checked.claim: Plan mode (Anthropic Claude Code) — capability reference, current as of 2026-04-22; code.claude.com/docs/en/permission-modes.md [practitioner direct].
